info.title: Amrutam Telemedicine API
info.description: Production-grade telemedicine backend: auth/MFA, doctor availability & booking (idempotent, saga-driven), consultations, prescriptions, payments, admin analytics.

post.summary: Register a new patient (or self-serve doctor, pending verification)

password.description: At least 10 chars; enforce complexity at the edge/IdP in production.

post.summary: Password login (step 1). Returns tokens, or an MFA challenge.
Complete MFA challenge (step 2) and receive tokens
Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair (rotating)
Revoke all sessions for the current user
Begin TOTP MFA enrolment; returns provisioning URI + QR
Confirm a TOTP code to enable MFA (revokes other sessions)
Create the calling doctor’s professional profile
Create availability slots from time blocks

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Client-generated unique key that makes this write idempotent.

get.summary: List a doctor’s available slots within a time window

post.summary: Book a consultation slot (idempotent, concurrency-safe, saga-driven)
post.description: Reserves the slot, creates a pending consultation, charges payment, and confirms — compensating automatically on failure. Send a unique Idempotency-Key header.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Client-generated unique key that makes this write idempotent.

get.summary: List my consultations (patient timeline or doctor calendar)
Get a consultation (participants only; PHI decrypted for them)

post.summary: Cancel a consultation (patient or doctor); refunds + frees the slot
Patient reviews a completed consultation (updates doctor rating)
Doctor issues a prescription for a consultation (encrypted at rest)

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Client-generated unique key that makes this write idempotent.

get.summary: Get a prescription (patient owner or issuing doctor)
KPI overview for a time window (cached)
Query the tamper-evident audit trail (keyset paginated)
